control_objective: Ensure only authorized users access systems
control_requirement: Access must be provisioned modified and revoked according to business role and authorization
implementation_examples: AWS IAM + SSO Integration
primary_evidence: Identity inventory and access review records
test_method: Inspect account provisioning and review approvals

control_requirement: Privileged access must require strong authentication
implementation_examples: AWS IAM MFA or hardware token authentication
primary_evidence: Authentication status records
test_method: Verify MFA enabled for privileged accounts

control_requirement: Systems must generate retain and protect security-relevant logs sufficient for monitoring investigation and response
implementation_examples: AWS CloudTrail and centralized logging platform
primary_evidence: Security log configuration and log records
test_method: Verify logging enabled and retained

control_requirement: Sensitive data stored in systems must be encrypted using approved cryptographic mechanisms
implementation_examples: AWS S3 SSE-KMS or encrypted storage services
primary_evidence: Encryption configuration and key management records
test_method: Inspect encryption configuration

control_requirement: Sensitive data transmitted across networks must be protected using secure transport protocols
implementation_examples: TLS-enabled load balancer or HTTPS endpoints
primary_evidence: Transport encryption configuration records
test_method: Inspect TLS configuration

control_requirement: Information system components must be inventoried and classified
implementation_examples: AWS Config asset inventory or CMDB system
primary_evidence: Asset inventory and classification records
test_method: Review inventory completeness

control_requirement: Vulnerabilities must be identified assessed prioritized and remediated within defined timelines
implementation_examples: AWS Inspector or vulnerability scanner
primary_evidence: Vulnerability scan results and remediation records
test_method: Review scan results and remediation status

control_requirement: Backups of critical data must be performed retained and periodically tested
implementation_examples: AWS Backup or backup management service
primary_evidence: Backup configuration and recovery test records
test_method: Review backup logs and test results

control_requirement: Incident response procedures must be defined maintained and periodically tested
implementation_examples: Incident response playbooks and response platform
primary_evidence: Incident response reports and test records
test_method: Review incident response testing

control_requirement: Third-party vendors must be evaluated for security risk before engagement
implementation_examples: Vendor security questionnaires or assessments
primary_evidence: Vendor risk assessment records
test_method: Review vendor security evaluations

control_requirement: Risks must be identified assessed tracked and treated through a defined governance process
implementation_examples: Risk management platform or register
primary_evidence: Risk register and treatment plans
test_method: Review risk register updates

control_requirement: Security policies and standards must be defined approved communicated and periodically reviewed
implementation_examples: Policy management platform
primary_evidence: Policy repository and review records
test_method: Verify policy review process

control_objective: Prevent unauthorized export of controlled technical data
control_requirement: A written Technology Control Plan must define access restrictions training and monitoring for ITAR/EAR-controlled technical data
implementation_examples: TCP document with role-based access matrix + annual training records
primary_evidence: TCP approval signature + training completion logs + access review reports
test_method: Review TCP documentation and validate access controls against controlled data inventories

control_objective: Prevent unauthorized transfer of controlled technology to foreign persons
control_requirement: Access to ITAR/EAR-controlled technical data must be restricted to authorized U.S. Persons or licensed foreign nationals
implementation_examples: Network segmentation + identity provider attributes (citizenship) + physical access badges
primary_evidence: Identity provider citizenship attributes + badge access logs + network ACL configurations
test_method: Sample foreign national access requests against authorized list; verify network segmentation rules

control_objective: Prevent commingling of controlled and uncontrolled data
control_requirement: Controlled technical data must be logically and physically segregated from non-controlled environments with documented boundaries
implementation_examples: Air-gapped networks or VPC isolation + separate storage buckets + distinct IAM roles
primary_evidence: Network diagrams + VPC flow logs + storage bucket policies + IAM role definitions
test_method: Validate network topology diagrams against actual cloud configurations; test cross-boundary access attempts

control_objective: Ensure only authorized personnel access controlled technical data
control_requirement: Personnel with access to ITAR/EAR-controlled data must undergo citizenship verification role-based authorization and export compliance training
implementation_examples: HR system citizenship flags + role-based access provisioning + LMS training completion
primary_evidence: HR citizenship records + IAM role assignments + training completion certificates
test_method: Query HR system for citizenship status; cross-reference with IAM role assignments for controlled systems

control_objective: Maintain auditable records of export control decisions
control_requirement: Records of export classifications license determinations and access decisions must be retained for 5 years minimum
implementation_examples: Document management system with retention policies + audit logging + immutable storage
primary_evidence: Retention policy configuration + audit logs + immutable storage verification
test_method: Verify retention policy settings; sample classified items against record retention; test audit log integrity

control_objective: Ensure training data is lawful representative and documented
control_requirement: Training data must be sourced lawfully documented for provenance and assessed for representativeness and bias
implementation_examples: Data lineage tracking + bias assessment reports + licensing documentation
primary_evidence: Data catalog entries + bias assessment reports + license records
test_method: Review data sourcing documentation; sample training datasets for provenance and bias metrics

control_objective: Identify and mitigate risks from AI model behavior
risk_addressed: Model failure adversarial attack unintended harm
control_requirement: AI models must undergo risk assessment covering safety security fairness and explainability before deployment
implementation_examples: NIST AI RMF MAP profile + ISO 42001 risk register + red team testing
primary_evidence: Risk assessment report + test results + mitigation plan
test_method: Validate risk assessment completeness against NIST AI RMF functions (GOVERN MAP MEASURE MANAGE)

control_objective: Ensure meaningful human review of high-impact AI decisions
risk_addressed: Automation bias wrongful denial regulatory non-compliance
control_requirement: High-impact AI decisions must allow human review override and appeal with documented escalation paths
implementation_examples: Human-in-the-loop workflow + appeal logging + escalation playbooks
primary_evidence: Appeal logs + workflow configuration + escalation test records
test_method: Test appeal workflow with sample decisions; verify human override capability

control_objective: Provide appropriate explainability and documentation to stakeholders
risk_addressed: Lack of trust regulatory penalty user harm
control_requirement: AI systems must provide documentation of purpose limitations data sources and decision logic appropriate to stakeholder role
implementation_examples: Model cards + system cards + API documentation + user-facing explanations
primary_evidence: Documentation repository + version control + stakeholder access logs
test_method: Verify documentation completeness against ISO 42001 Annex A controls; sample stakeholder access
